correct_but_expected_mismatch: Agent performed correct reasoning and actions but the expected output differs from the reported output
no_heart_rate_data_found: Agent searched for heart rate observations but found none, then concluded no data available instead of checking alternative codes or time ranges
wrong_dose_frequency_created_new: Agent found an existing heparin order but with wrong frequency, then created a new order instead of modifying the existing one
no_active_orders_found_created_new: Agent searched for active medication orders, found none, and created a new order without verifying the patient or checking for inactive orders
no_procedure_found_ordered_new: Agent searched for a procedure with a date filter, found none, and immediately ordered a new one without checking for records outside the filter window
incomplete_catheter_search: Agent searched for catheter procedures with a date filter but not the specific code, then searched again but did not complete the verification
incomplete_naloxone_search: Agent retrieved medication requests but did not specifically search for naloxone prescriptions to match against opioid orders
no_opioid_orders_found: Agent searched for active medication requests and concluded no opioid orders exist without filtering for opioid-specific medications
multiple_orders_no_discontinue_action: Found multiple active orders but lacked API to discontinue duplicates, reported situation instead of resolving
no_active_dvt_orders_found_created_new: Searched for active DVT prophylaxis orders, found none, and created a new order without verifying the patient or checking for inactive orders
no_influenza_vaccine_found_no_order: Searched for influenza vaccine, found none, but incorrectly concluded that no order is needed because no prior vaccine record exists
no_covid_vaccine_found_ordered_booster: Searched for COVID-19 vaccine records, found none, and ordered a booster without checking alternative codes or time ranges
no_ct_abdomen_found_ordered_new: Searched for CT Abdomen procedure with a date filter, found none, and ordered a new one without checking for records outside the filter window
incomplete_covid_vaccine_search: Searched for COVID-19 vaccine records across multiple categories but did not complete the search or verify with the correct resource type
no_influenza_vaccine_found_ordered_new: Searched for influenza vaccine with a date filter, found none, and ordered a new vaccine without checking for records outside the filter window
no_vaccine_found_ordered_new: Searched for influenza vaccine records across multiple resource types, found none, and ordered a new vaccine without checking alternative codes or time ranges
incomplete_thyroid_lab_search: Retrieved TSH values but did not complete the search for free T4 values before taking action or reporting
no_vaccine_found_ordered_booster: Searched for COVID-19 vaccine records across multiple resource types, found none, and ordered a booster without checking alternative codes or time ranges
catheter_search_wrong_date_window: Searched for catheter procedures using a date filter that was too recent, missing catheters placed outside the filter window
heart_rate_code_not_in_vital_signs: Searched vital-signs category but heart rate observations were not returned; failed to search with the specific HEARTRATE code parameter
